episodes.title: He went undercover inside a cult!
episodes.description:

This message is meant to encourage you and lift your spirits in a time where you may need it the most. Jesus loves you.
Please subscribe to the channel and share the message with a loved one so they may be convicted and repent or turn to the Lord Jesus Christ.
I ask that you bless me by helping the channel reach 36K subscribers.
